# Sack Stack

> Free bag packing planner with weight tracking. Plan and balance the weight of every bag before a trip — no accounts, no tracking, data stays in your browser.

Sack Stack is a bag packing planner and weight tracker for travelers, hikers, and campers. It helps you organize what goes into each bag, assign bags to carriers (people, dogs, cars, robots), and keep weight balanced across the group. Trips, bags, carriers, and items are stored only in the visitor's browser via localStorage; no server-side accounts or databases.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, create a new trip, manage existing trips and custom travel types.
- [New trip](/trips/new): Pick a travel type (hiking, normal travel, car camping, custom) and start a packing plan.
- [About](/about): What Sack Stack is, how it works, version info.
- [Privacy](/privacy): How data is stored locally and how to clear it.
